name: S3 server-side encryption not enabled
description: One or more S3 buckets do not have default server-side encryption configured. Unencrypted buckets store objects in plaintext, risking data exposure if AWS infrastructure is compromised.
remediation: Enable default encryption on all S3 buckets. Use SSE-KMS with a CMK for sensitive data. Apply S3 bucket policies denying uploads without server-side encryption headers.
